channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Smashed glass all over road and pavement, 28th May
item.description:
A car was recently broken into. Since then, smashed glass fragments have been left over road and pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stellman Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rear of 39 Sutherland Avenue, 28th May
item.description:
Dead Fox in a regular used alleyway by Rochester way and Sutherland Avenue. Been there since Friday and has been reported more than once for smell and deteriorating. This is used by lots of traffic and dust lorries ect
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat on road, 28th May
item.description:
Recently dead cat in middle of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post damaged, 28th May
item.description:
Police called to report a RTC Summer Hill Junction with Islehurst Close, BR7 5QU. Lamp post has been struck (93521.) Tarmac around lamp post has been displaced. CAD: 41728/05/2026
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenshill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches & tree detrius on pavement & in kerb, 28th May
item.description:
Branches & tree detrius on pavement & in kerb
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Garden Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street light, 28th May
item.description:
It’s pitch black
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marden Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No street lighting again, 28th May
item.description:
No lights
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Walk, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedgerow overgrown fronting Regents House on Copers Cope Road, 27th May
item.description:
The hedgerow fronting Regents House on Copers Cope Road is significantly encroached across the public pavement and in need of cutting back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copers Cope Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked in middle of the road, 27th May
item.description:
Forest bike parked in the Middle of the road very close to a parked car, making roadway quite narrow.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Trevor Square, Knightsbridge, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small pile of tree branches on grass verge, 27th May
item.description:
Small pile of broken branches discarded on grass verge under tree on Copers Cope Road near Alton Gardens.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copers Cope Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blankets, pillow, and litter dumped, 27th May
item.description:
Dumped blankets, pillow, and litter behind children’s nursery

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allen Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of door number 2. Public steps, 27th May
item.description:
There is frequent fly-tipping at this location. Food waste is consistently disposed of improperly, and foxes regularly tear open the black bags, scattering plastic and litter across the area. The resulting smell attracts large numbers of flies and is creating an ongoing public hygiene and environmental nuisance. In addition, rubbish and dumped items are obstructing the stairs along the passage, creating a potential safety hazard and restricting access for residents and pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardeners Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa and carpets, 27th May
item.description:
Dumped sofa and carpets

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hubbard Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Clothes Airer Dumped on Pavement, 27th May
item.description:
An unwanted clothes airer has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 61 for the past several weeks. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waverley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Turfed Area, 27th May
item.description:
An item of broken furniture has been left dumped on the turfed area next to the CCTV post. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walmer Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Timber Dumped on Turfed Area, 27th May
item.description:
Items of unwanted timber have been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walmer Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins need cleaning, 27th May
item.description:
It has been like this over a week now. This is not hygienic and have probably already invited rats

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Turfed Area, 27th May
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walmer Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Domestic Rubbish Bins Dumped on Turfed Area, 27th May
item.description:
Two unwanted domestic rubbish bins have been left dumped on the turfed area next to the CCTV post. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walmer Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Empty Boxes Dumped on Pavement, 27th May
item.description:
Multiple empty boxes have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walmer Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
